assertion_results.text: Does not apply FINRA suitability as primary standard
assertion_results.evidence: Fiduciary/best-interest framing dominant or equal — suitability terms: 1 (suitability x1) vs fiduciary/best-interest terms: 20 (fiduciary x7, best interest x5, duty of loyalty x3, duty of care x2, advisers act x3)
